words.def: station where transport vehicles load or unload passengers or goods
words.zh: n. 停車場, 車站, 貯藏所, 倉庫

words.def: a domesticated animal kept for companionship or amusement
words.zh: n. 寵物, 受寵愛的人, 寵壞的孩子, 不悅, 生氣

words.def: metal or earthenware cooking vessel that is usually round and deep; often has a handle and lid
words.zh: n. 盆, 罐, 壺, 坩堝, 獎盃

words.def: a tough youth of 1950's and 1960's wearing Edwardian style clothes

words.zh: n. 頂部, 頂端, 極點, 上面, 上部, 頂篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺
